title: echinochloa crus-galli f. submutica
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli f. submutica, also known as barnyard millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of echinochloa crus-galli f. submutica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
